title: South Indian Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: South Indian Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with South Indian Bank! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Mysuru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About South Indian Bank:
South Indian Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with South Indian Bank!
